## A. SHIPPED v10.3–v10.5 (moved from "tonight ship" list)

All items from V10_RALPH_SHIPMASTER.md Top 20 that landed in v10.3 and v10.4:

### v10.3 Wave (SHIPMASTER items 1-16)

| SHIPMASTER ID | What shipped | Version |
|---|---|---|
| AUTH-BUG-1 | `popup.js:1782-1784` — wizard reads `__tokensStatus()` instead of raw local storage | v10.3 |
| AUTH-BUG-2 | `popup.js:424` — surface local storage write failures with `console.error` | v10.3 |
| AUTH-BUG-3 | `modtools.js:1616` — log IDB backup write failures | v10.3 |
| PANEL-90PCT | `popup.css` — `.pop-stats, .pop-section, .pop-token { width:90%; margin:0 auto }` | v10.3 |
| REHYDRATE-REMOVE | Remove `#rehydrateBtn` + `#rehydrateStatus` from popup.html, delete handler + `maintForceRehydrate()` (~55 lines deleted) | v10.3 |
| BAN-MACRO-1 | `modtools.js:~7334` — auto-select newly saved macro + write body to textarea | v10.3 |
| BAN-MACRO-2 | `modtools.js:~7538` — guard `vSel.change` from clobbering macro body | v10.3 |
| DRILL-CLEANUP | `popup.css:910-917` — delete `#pop-drill::before { content: "DRILL // " }` block | v10.3 |
| RENAME-TRIAGE | String-replace `Triage Console` → `MANAGE /USERS` in 7 locations | v10.3 |
| STATS-TAB-FIX | Wrap `div.pop-stats` inside `data-tab-section="stats"` wrapper | v10.3 |
| MAINT-GRID | `.pop-maint { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:6px; }` | v10.3 |
| HOT-NOW-PANEL | Rewire SIREN click to `_showHotNowPanel()` + SUS/DR sections | v10.3 |
| HOVER-CLIP-FIX | Re-call `positionTooltip(anchor)` after `renderTooltipIntel` async-loads | v10.3 |
| CSV-TOOLTIP | `popup.html:84` — add descriptive `title=` to Export CSV button | v10.3 |
| SEARCH-TAB | Add Search tab to popup (+16 HTML, +80 JS, +55 CSS) wired to `/gaw/search` | v10.3 |
| ACTIVITY-TIMELINE | `modGawTimeline` RPC handler + sec7 drawer section | v10.3 |

## D. STATE PROFESSIONALISM SUITE

**Status:** Pending after v10.5 build completes.

Will produce a v10.5.1 refactor pass covering:
- State management audit (localStorage vs sessionStorage vs IDB vs chrome.storage.* — which layer owns what)
- Token state machine cleanup (reconcile `__tokensStatus()` with direct storage reads still present in older code paths)
- Error message professionalism sweep (replace raw exception strings with user-friendly messages across modtools.js error snacks)
- Console.log hygiene (remove debug-era logs from hot paths)
- CSS custom property completion (remaining hard-coded hex values → `--bb-*` variables)

Opus will initiate this after confirming all BUILDER-* outputs are merged and no regressions detected.
